chunks.title: Jeroboam Returns to Shechem
chunks.reason: Narrative introduction of the political gathering and initial request.

chunks.title: Counsel and Rejection of Elders
chunks.reason: Extended dialogue between Rehoboam, elders, and young men leading to the harsh response.

chunks.title: Division of the Kingdom
chunks.reason: The people's rejection of Rehoboam and the establishment of the northern rebellion.
